source_pr.title: store/tikv: fix unstable tests in snapshot_fail_test.go
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Failures like https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/65623/pipeline

The `k4` written by `TestRetryPointGetWithTS` may affect other tests.

And it's also important to remove `asyncCommitDoNothing` failpoint a bit later **after the point get assertion**. Otherwise, the transaction might not be affected by the failpoint if it didn't run to the failpoint before the failpoint is removed.

### What is changed and how it works?

Delete `k4` after running `TestRetryPointGetWithTS`. 

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test
- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- No code

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM
- Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note.

symptoms: TestRetryPointGetWithTS polluted shared KV state (leftover key k4) and had a failpoint lifetime race, affecting other tests.
failure_signature: TestRetryPointGetWithTS polluted shared KV state (leftover key k4) and had a failpoint lifetime race, affecting other tests.
root_cause_explanation: The suite is flaky due to shared-state pollution and timing races: TestRetryPointGetWithTS wrote a fixed key (k4) and did not reliably clean it up, so later tests could observe polluted state. In addition, disabling the asyncCommitDoNothing failpoint too early could race with the code path reaching the failpoint, making the test behavior non-deterministic. This PR stabilizes the suite by adding per-test cleanup (delete keys / cleanup helper) and disabling failpoints only after the point-get assertion completes.
fix_pattern: Add per-test cleanup to remove written keys and keep failpoints enabled until after the relevant assertion; use cleanup helpers/defer to ensure isolation between tests.

evidence: evidence: store/tikv: fix unstable tests in snapshot_fail_test.go
